falsification_posture: This is a governance falsification attempt. Reviewer must seek where governance fails, not where it succeeds.
first_reviewer_output_rule: Do not report Round 2B results until this artifact is confirmed with parity_ok=true.

dual_session_requirement.definition: Group A and Group B tasks must each be executed in a separate, independent Claude session with no prior context from this run or this repository's governance state.
dual_session_requirement.session_a_role: Ungoverned baseline (Group A workspace). Fresh session with no governance memory.
dual_session_requirement.session_b_role: Governed path (Group B workspace). Fresh session with no governance memory.
prohibited: Running Group A and Group B in the same session window
Referencing prior session outputs within either session
Injecting reviewer hints or expected outcomes into session prompts
Carrying any task-01..04 result across sessions before both are complete

same_repo_snapshot.condition: Both Group A and Group B derive from the same source commit

same_prompt_hash.condition: Task 1-4 prompt text unchanged from docs/ab-fixed-prompts-lock.md

same_tool_access.condition: Both sessions use identical tool set (no group-specific tool restriction)

same_file_visibility.condition: File visibility rules equal (governance files present in B, absent in A — this difference is intentional, not a parity violation)

same_stop_condition.condition: Both sessions use identical stop condition and timeout boundary

no_reviewer_hint_injection.condition: No expected outcome or reviewer framing injected into either session prompt

memory_carryover_absent.condition: No prior session memory carries over into Group A or Group B execution
memory_carryover_absent.reason: Previous Round 2B execution ran A and B within the same session window. Dual fresh-session execution not yet completed.
memory_carryover_absent.required_evidence: Two separate session invocations with independent context windows, each starting from repo snapshot only.

no_post_hoc_prompt_modification.condition: Prompt text not modified after either session begins
no_post_hoc_prompt_modification.note: Anti-drift rule from runbook: prompt lock verified before execution begins.

no_post_hoc_relabeling.condition: Failure codes and pass/fail criteria not relabeled after seeing outcomes
no_post_hoc_relabeling.note: Anti-drift rule from runbook: any violation sets run_protocol_violation=true.

to_lift_block.action: Execute Group A tasks and Group B tasks in separate, independent fresh sessions.
after_execution: Update execution-parity.json for each target: set memory_carryover_absent=true, parity_ok=true
Capture raw session behavior in task-01..04.json for each group
Run ab_smoke_artifact_validator.py before any falsification matrix review
First falsification matrix output must start with weakest_supported_axis, not overall result

first_diagnosis_question: If behavior_delta appears weak after dual fresh-session execution: first ask whether governance is weak OR whether experimental isolation was insufficient — before attributing to framework.
nextjs_byok_exclusion_reason: Group A workspace is empty after sanitization. This example repo is 100% governance scaffolding with no independent engineering baseline. A/B comparison is structurally impossible.
note: capture_in_progress is the correct claim level until dual fresh-session execution completes. live_behavior_observed requires memory_carryover_absent=true confirmed.
